text.title: Design System Success Factors Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree from observable signals to a rule-grounded conclusion.

decision-tree.root-question: Does a design system exist with measurable artefacts?

conclusion.verdict: produce quarterly health report; address gaps
author the system first; measure later
lightweight checklist only; governance overhead exceeds value

example.trace: 3-team org with system → adoption-tracked-per-team → quarterly report + billing remediation

text.example: Trace through the tree producing the leaf conclusion.
